title: ExNihilo: Automation
body:
[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.com/invite/eeFZXAQaSX)


## Current supported versions:

- 1.16.4/5 for ExNihilo 2.0.2.8
- 1.19.2 for ExNihilo 4.2.0.64 > ..
- 1.21 for ExNihilo 7.0.0 (beta) 
  - Requires Neoforge 21.0.81

__**ExNihilo: Sequentia**__ - [https://modrinth.com/mod/exnihilosequentia](https://modrinth.com/mod/exnihilosequentia)

**Logo:** nora_hanegan

**Suggestions** and **issues** can be made in the **issues tab** or click [here](https://github.com/lazyMods/ExNihiloAutomation/issues).

 

__**This mod adds:**__

\- Automatic Siever

\- Automatic Hammer

\- Compressed Blocks

\- Automatic Silker

\- Upgrading system.

\- Patchouli Book.

 

__**Configs:**__

\- Change job time for the automatic blocks.

\- Change energy capacity for the automatic blocks.
